_doc: End-of-line filler phrases the writer reaches for when a rhyme is hard. Catches the AA-CW-26 'at rest' / 'in light' regression class. Compared against trailing-N-words of each line after lowercasing and stripping punctuation. If a line ends with one of these AND the line is not load-bearing (i.e. the phrase carries no content), the deterministic gate forces a rewrite.
